name: sn97-king-tool-calling
description: Flue (https://flueframework.com) agents that use the SN97 king model from chat.arbos.life with tool calling.

scripts.run:chat: flue run king-chat --target node --id demo --env .env --payload '{"message": "What is Bittensor SN97? Answer in one sentence."}'
scripts.run:weather: flue run king-weather --target node --id demo --env .env --payload '{"city": "San Francisco"}'
scripts.run:research: flue run king-research --target node --id demo --env .env --payload '{"topic": "How does Bittensor SN97 prevent Goodhart-style overfitting?"}'
